scripts.bundle: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --legal-comments=none --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.test: tsx --test test/*.test.ts test/gitlab/*.test.ts test/util/*.test.ts test/jira/*.test.ts test/orchestrator/*.test.ts
scripts.test:watch: tsx --test --watch test/*.test.ts test/gitlab/*.test.ts test/util/*.test.ts test/jira/*.test.ts test/orchestrator/*.test.ts
